name: sf-rich-editor
title: SF Rich Editor
description: Lazy-loaded rich-text editor with bold/italic/underline/strike, H1-H3, lists, blockquote, code, and link extension. Composes Tiptap v3 + ProseMirror. injectCSS:false + .ProseMirror scoped rules in app/globals.css. Import via next/dynamic only — NOT in sf/index.ts barrel.
